mapper.sql: ep.id as experienceProgramId, ep.experience_program_title as experienceProgramTitle, ep.experience_program_job as experienceProgramJob, ep.experience_program_deadline as experienceProgramDeadline, ep.experience_program_view_count as experienceProgramViewCount, ep.experience_program_recruitment_count as experienceProgramRecruitmentCount, coalesce(ap.applicant_count, 0) as applicantCount, ep.corp_id as corpId, c.corp_company_name as corpCompanyName, ( select f.file_path from tbl_corp_logo_file clf join tbl_file f on clf.id = f.id where clf.corp_id = c.id order by f.id desc limit 1 ) as corpLogoFilePath, ( select f.file_name from tbl_corp_logo_file clf join tbl_file f on clf.id = f.id where clf.corp_id = c.id order by f.id desc limit 1 ) as corpLogoFileName

from tbl_experience_program ep join tbl_corp c on ep.corp_id = c.id left join ( select a.experience_program_id, count(*) as applicant_count from tbl_apply a where a.apply_status != 'cancelled' group by a.experience_program_id ) ap on ap.experience_program_id = ep.id
mapper.select:
select
where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' order by ep.experience_program_view_count desc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}

select
where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' and c.corp_company_type = '공기업' order by ep.experience_program_view_count desc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}

select
where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' and c.corp_company_type = '공기업' order by ep.updated_datetime desc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}

select
where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' order by ep.updated_datetime desc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}

select
where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' order by case when ep.experience_program_deadline is null then 1 else 0 end asc, ep.experience_program_deadline asc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}

select
where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' order by ep.experience_program_recruitment_count desc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}

select
where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' order by ep.created_datetime desc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}

select
join tbl_latest_watch_posting lw on lw.experience_program_id = ep.id and lw.member_id = #{memberId} where ep.experience_program_status = 'recruiting' order by lw.created_datetime desc, ep.id desc limit #{limit}
